sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, value Float32, text_value String, created_at DateTime);
SELECT blockSerializedSize(value % 2) AS serialized_size FROM test_table;
SELECT value, blockSerializedSize(id % 2 + 1) AS serialized_size FROM test_table WHERE created_at < '2023-02-01 00:00:00';
CREATE TABLE another_table (id Int32, reference_id Int32, value Float32, extra_info String);
SELECT t.id, t.value, blockSerializedSize((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM another_table a WHERE a.reference_id = t.id) % 3) AS size FROM test_table t;
SELECT AVG(value) AS average_value, HAVING blockSerializedSize(value) >= 4 FROM test_table GROUP BY text_value;
SELECT blockSerializedSize(NULLIF(value, 0)) AS non_zero_size FROM test_table;
CREATE TABLE edge_case_table (id Int32, value String DEFAULT 'default');
SELECT blockSerializedSize(value % 1) AS mod_size FROM edge_case_table;
SELECT blockSerializedSize(value) AS size, blockSerializedSize(NULLIF(value, '')) AS non_empty_size FROM edge_case_table;
SELECT id, blockSerializedSize(text_value) + blockSerializedSize(value) AS total_size FROM test_table WHERE value > (SELECT MAX(value) FROM test_table);
